name: Parlies
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter and molasses until the butter is melted.
2. Blend in the brown sugar.
3. Mix in the dry ingredients well.
4. While the dough is still hot, roll out small amounts at a time until very thin.
5. Cut into diamond shapes, rectangles, or using cookie cutters.
6. Cook on a greased cookie sheet in a 350°F oven for 10 minutes, or until brown. Watch carefully as they burn easily.
